column9: It snows only ________ a month in winter. (два раза)

column15: How long _____ ____ ______ you to paint a picture? (present simple)

column17: It _______ me one day to make a box. (present simple)
column18: How long does it _______ you to drive home usually?
column19: I have lived here ______ two years.
column20: I _____ (not to see) you since college.
column21: Steven has been a worker ____ he left school.
